svg.style: font-family:Lato, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif;font-feature-settings:"liga", "kern", "calt", "lnum";text-rendering:geometricPrecision;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-size:18px;background-color:#ffffff

a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Number of people living in the world's largest cities

The number of people living in cities ranked among the top 100 most populous in 2020.
Cities
are identified
using satellite imagery and population data, applying the same density and size thresholds across all countries.
Data source: European Commission, Joint Research Centre (JRC) (2025)
Note: Because a standardized global definition is used instead of national administrative ones, the figures may differ from those reported by
